name: codex-master
description: Local Codex Masterjet plugin for controlling a sleeping Agentinnen pool through a data-sparse tmux MCP server.

interface.shortDescription: Control isolated Codex Agentinnen with a local Masterjet MCP.
interface.longDescription: Adds the codex-master-mcp local MCP server plus fleet-management skills and an App Bridge manifest for starting, assigning, auditing, and safely inspecting a scalable sleeping Codex Agentinnen pool through tmux. The tool surface is data-sparse by default and keeps prompt text, Agentin responses, raw terminal logs, and raw-log file paths out of normal MCP responses.
defaultPrompt: Use Codex Master to start Agentin A1 and Agentin B1
Assign a read-only Exploriererin task with codex-master-mcp
Check codex-master App Bridge and MCP status
